handoff.reason: Bulletproof concept #6 re-open. Prerequisite satisfied. Replace state.elements iteration in buildFileHeaderStatusMap with graph-node file-grain loop.

execution_rules.phase_1: Single phase, no hard stop. Implement change, run all tests + AC invariants + tsc clean, commit.

buildFileHeaderFactMap must NOT be changed (no graph equivalent for headerFact)

communication_log.note: WO-RAG-INDEX-TWO-GRAIN-DROP-002 created. Bulletproof concept #6 re-open. Prerequisite WO-RAG-INDEX-GRAPH-BUILDER-HEADER-STATUS-001 archived. Premise now valid: file-grain nodes carry headerStatus.
